creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
Vitaly,

is this still a problem?

Apparently I can require lgi and then intantiate a Gtk object fine, and
lua-5.1 samples/gtkhello.lua appears to work fine, too, for me, and I
have linked against Gtk+2:

> $ ldd /usr/local/lib/lua/5.1/lgi/corelgilua51.so | grep libg
> 	libgirepository-1.0.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libgirepository-1.0.so.1 (0x801217000)
> 	libgobject-2.0.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0 (0x80144a000)
> 	libgmodule-2.0.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/libgmodule-2.0.so.0 (0x801697000)
> 	libglib-2.0.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/libglib-2.0.so.0 (0x80189a000)
> 	libgio-2.0.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/libgio-2.0.so.0 (0x8023e7000)
> 	libgcc_s.so.1 => /lib/libgcc_s.so.1 (0x804fa5000)

Best regards,
Matthias
